project.name: Tax Authority Enterprise RAG
project.description: Evidence-backed enterprise Retrieval-Augmented Generation system for a national tax authority with zero-hallucination citation, RBAC filtering, hybrid BM25+dense search, and AWS-native observability.

nodes.name: emit_demo_traces.py
nodes.summary: Emits 5 representative RAG pipeline traces to Jaeger via OTLP, covering normal queries, cache hits, refusals, and RBAC-blocked requests with realistic latency values matching the Module 4 §4.2 design budget.

nodes.name: emit_trace
nodes.summary: Emits a single OpenTelemetry trace for one RAG scenario, spanning auth, embed, retrieval (HNSW+BM25+RRF), rerank, grade, generate, citation verify, and audit spans with role-bound attributes.

nodes.name: conftest.py
nodes.summary: Shared pytest fixtures and helpers for the Tax Authority RAG evaluation suite. Defines promotion-gate constants, RBAC role matrix, dataclasses (UserContext, ChunkMeta, RAGResponse), a deterministic MockRAGClient, HaikuJudge LLM-as-judge, EmbeddingClient, TelemetrySink, and synthetic corpus (MOCK_CORPUS) with Dutch tax-law fixtures.

nodes.name: UserContext
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing an authenticated user with user_id, role (helpdesk/inspector/legal/fiod), and classification_ceiling. Provides allowed_classifications property backed by the RBAC role matrix.

nodes.name: ChunkMeta
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a retrieved document chunk with full citation metadata: chunk_id, doc_id, doc_type, classification, ELI/ECLI identifiers, article/lid/onderdeel/sub hierarchy, temporal validity dates, tax_year, superseded_by, and score.

nodes.name: RAGResponse
nodes.summary: Dataclass encapsulating the full RAG pipeline response: answer text, citations list, grader verdict, retrieved chunks, refusal payload, latency metrics (TTFT/E2E/retrieval/rerank), cache hit flag, token counts, and loop-guard counters.

nodes.name: HaikuJudge
nodes.summary: LLM-as-judge wrapper around Claude Haiku 4.5 via Bedrock. Provides judge_entailment (NLI check for citation grounding), judge_refusal (RBAC leak detection), and judge_faithfulness (RAG faithfulness scoring 0.0-1.0) using structured tool-use outputs.

nodes.name: MockRAGClient
nodes.summary: Deterministic RAG pipeline stub for non-LLM tests. Implements retrieve() with RBAC pre-filter, ECLI/article exact-match, Dutch stopword filtering, and compound noun stemming; implements query() to produce structured RAGResponse with grounded citations or structured refusal payloads.

nodes.name: TelemetrySink
nodes.summary: In-memory OpenTelemetry span collector for observability tests. Stores SpanRecord objects with name, attributes, and timing; provides spans_by_name lookup for assertions.

nodes.name: SpanRecord
nodes.summary: Dataclass for a single captured telemetry span with name, attributes dict, start/end timestamps in nanoseconds, and computed duration_ms property.

nodes.name: EmbeddingClient
nodes.summary: Thin wrapper for Cohere embed-multilingual-v3 (1024-dim) via Bedrock. Provides embed() for batch text embedding and cosine_similarity() for semantic comparison.

nodes.name: build_cache_key
nodes.summary: Constructs a role-bound SHA-256 cache key from query_embedding_bucket, user_role, classification_ceiling, and tax_year_context. Implements module-4 §2.2 role-partitioned cache namespace.

nodes.name: assert_no_fiod_content
nodes.summary: Asserts that a response string contains no FIOD-classified content markers (katvanger, staatsgeheim, etc.). Hard-fail assertion used in RBAC red-team tests.

nodes.name: load_golden_qa
nodes.summary: Loads golden Q&A pairs from tests/golden/golden_qa.jsonl. Returns empty list if file is absent, making golden-set tests gracefully skippable.

nodes.name: seed_opensearch.py
nodes.summary: CLI script to create and populate the tax-docs-test OpenSearch index with ~250 documents: 20 from MOCK_CORPUS plus 230 synthetic fixtures. Configures Lucene HNSW k-NN with m=32, ef_construction=256, ef_search=128, dim=1024, Dutch text analyzer, and all ChunkMeta schema fields.

nodes.name: ensure_index
nodes.summary: Creates or recreates the tax-docs-test OpenSearch index with full HNSW k-NN and field mapping configuration.

nodes.name: generate_synthetic_fixtures
nodes.summary: Generates n synthetic ChunkMeta objects spanning all doc_type × classification × tax_year combinations to supplement MOCK_CORPUS for integration tests.

nodes.name: seed_chunks
nodes.summary: Bulk-indexes a list of ChunkMeta objects into OpenSearch using the opensearchpy bulk helper, with random 1024-dim vectors as embeddings for dev seeding.

nodes.name: test_ambiguity_refusal.py
nodes.summary: Validates the CRAG fallback/refusal behaviour: out-of-corpus, under-specified, and contradictory queries must produce structured refusals with no fabricated citations, correct payload shape, and loop-guard caps enforced.

nodes.name: test_out_of_corpus_query_refuses
nodes.summary: Parametrized test: out-of-corpus queries must produce answer=None, empty citations, non-null refusal_payload with status='insufficient_grounding', and grader_verdict in {Irrelevant, Ambiguous}.

nodes.name: test_refusal_payload_shape
nodes.summary: Validates structured_refusal payload has required contract fields (status, message, closest_hits, missing_aspects) and closest_hits contain no FIOD content.

nodes.name: test_loop_guard_caps_attempts
nodes.summary: Verifies attempt_count <= 2 and gen_retry_count <= 1 as documented hard caps on the CRAG self-healing loop.

nodes.name: test_citation_accuracy.py
nodes.summary: Zero-hallucination citation guard tests. Validates citation anchor parsing (doc_id, article, lid, onderdeel, sub, ECLI), Step 1+2 deterministic verifier, NLI judge integration tests, golden-set coverage, and empty-grounding refusal safety. Citation Accuracy must equal 1.00 (hard promotion gate).

nodes.name: TestCitationAnchorDepth
nodes.summary: Tests that ANCHOR_PATTERN and verify_citations_deterministic enforce full citation depth (lid + onderdeel + sub), not just doc_id/article. Covers ECLI pattern matching and sub-level mismatch detection.

nodes.name: TestCitationNLIJudge
nodes.summary: Integration tests using the HaikuJudge NLI check: faithful claims pass entailment, hallucinated or wrong-year claims fail. Faithfulness score gate >= 0.95 enforced.

nodes.name: TestCitationOnGoldenSet
nodes.summary: Parametrized tests over golden_qa.jsonl: all citations in mock responses must be grounded in retrieved chunks, and corpus must contain lid/onderdeel granularity required by expected_citations.

nodes.name: TestCitationOnEmptyGrounding
nodes.summary: Validates that structured refusal responses contain zero citation anchors and no fabricated article numbers, matching module-3 §2.2 zero-hallucination guarantee.

nodes.name: extract_citation_tuples
nodes.summary: Extracts all citation anchors from generated answer text using ANCHOR_PATTERN (doc_id/article/lid/onderdeel/sub) and ECLI_PATTERN. Returns list of dicts.

nodes.name: verify_citations_deterministic
nodes.summary: Steps 1+2 of the citation verifier: extracts all citations from answer text and identifies unsupported ones (no matching chunk in retrieved context). Returns (all_citations, unsupported_citations).

nodes.name: test_hybrid_retrieval.py
nodes.summary: Tests hybrid BM25+dense retrieval correctness: ECLI/article exact-match queries rank correctly via BM25, semantic queries surface in top-5, RRF fusion combines and deduplicates arms, reranker improves nDCG@5, and cascade top-K sizes match MASTER-PLAN constants.

nodes.name: bm25_rank
nodes.summary: Deterministic BM25 stand-in: token-overlap scoring with ECLI (+100) and article-number (+50) exact-match boosts, simulating the Lucene BM25 arm behavior.

nodes.name: rrf_fuse
nodes.summary: Reciprocal Rank Fusion implementation (k=60, Cormack et al.), merges multiple ranked lists by chunk_id with deduplication.

nodes.name: ndcg_at_k
nodes.summary: Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain at k, used to compare reranker performance against RRF-only baseline.

nodes.name: test_latency_budgets.py
nodes.summary: Enforces SLA latency budgets from Module 4 §4.2: p95 TTFT <= 1500ms, p99 TTFT <= 2500ms, p95 E2E <= 4000ms, retrieval p95 <= 300ms, rerank p95 <= 200ms. Includes 100-query smoke run and cold/warm cache differential test.

nodes.name: test_ttft_p95_within_budget
nodes.summary: 100-query smoke run measuring TTFT; asserts p95 <= 1500ms and prints p50/p95/p99 distribution.

nodes.name: _percentile
nodes.summary: Linear interpolation percentile computation used for p50/p95/p99 latency assertions.

nodes.name: test_observability.py
nodes.summary: Validates OTel span emission contracts (Module 4 §5.2) and Ragas-style metric gates (ContextPrecision >= 0.85, ContextRecall >= 0.90, AnswerRelevancy >= 0.90, Faithfulness >= 0.95). Tests span attribute requirements, user_role propagation, refusal spans, and verdict attributes.

nodes.name: test_generate_span_has_bedrock_metadata
nodes.summary: Validates generate span carries trace_id, user_role, token_count_in/out, and bedrock_model_id attributes required for cost tracking.

nodes.name: test_user_role_propagates_to_every_span
nodes.summary: Asserts user_role attribute is present on every emitted span for RBAC audit trail compliance.

nodes.name: test_rbac_redteam.py
nodes.summary: Adversarial RBAC red-team test suite with 7 threat-model classes: direct FIOD title query, semantic FIOD proximity attack, cache poisoning across roles, prompt injection/privilege escalation, structured-refusal existence disclosure, legal-counsel FIOD escalation, and redaction-guard audit counter. FIOD leak = hard pipeline block (RBAC Leak Rate = 0.00).

nodes.name: TestHelpdeskDirectFIODQuery
nodes.summary: Threat: DIRECT TITLE ATTACK. Validates helpdesk querying exact FIOD memo title is refused, no FIOD chunks are retrieved, and audit telemetry records the denied attempt.

nodes.name: TestHelpdeskSemanticFIODQuery
nodes.summary: Threat: SEMANTIC PROXIMITY ATTACK. Validates semantically-close FIOD queries are refused without FIOD content or existence disclosure (domain review Check 5 fix).

nodes.name: TestCachePoisoningCrossRole
nodes.summary: Threat: CACHE CONFUSION / CONFUSED-DEPUTY ATTACK. Proves role-partitioned cache keys prevent FIOD analyst's cached answer from serving helpdesk user. Includes Redis integration test.

nodes.name: TestPromptInjection
nodes.summary: Threat: PROMPT INJECTION / PRIVILEGE ESCALATION. Tests DSL override, role impersonation, SQL-injection-style filter, and jailbreak via hypothetical framing. Validates RBAC filter operates at DB layer, not LLM instruction layer.

nodes.name: TestStructuredRefusalRedactionGuard
nodes.summary: Threat: EXISTENCE DISCLOSURE VIA STRUCTURED REFUSAL (domain review Check 5 - CRITICAL). Tests that redaction_guard is applied to closest_hits before refusal serialisation, stripping FIOD doc IDs and excerpts.

nodes.name: TestLegalCounselFIODEscalation
nodes.summary: Threat: ROLE-CEILING VIOLATION. Validates legal counsel (ceiling=internal) cannot retrieve FIOD chunks, queries are refused, and cache keys differ from FIOD analyst.

nodes.name: TestRedactionGuardAuditCounter
nodes.summary: Validates secondary RBAC gate (redaction_guard Layer 2) correctly drops or passes chunks based on classification ordinal, covering helpdesk/inspector/fiod role scenarios.

nodes.name: redaction_guard
nodes.summary: Secondary RBAC gate (module-4 §3.3 Layer 2): drops chunks whose classification ordinal exceeds user's ceiling. Any dropped chunk should trigger an audit warning.

nodes.name: build_structured_refusal
nodes.summary: Builds structured_refusal payload (module-3 §2.2) with redaction_guard applied to closest_hits — the domain review Check 5 fix that prevents FIOD existence disclosure.

nodes.name: test_semantic_cache.py
nodes.summary: Validates semantic cache safety guarantees: role/year/classification-bound cache keys, 0.97 cosine threshold floor blocking year-confused near-misses, 24h TTL ceiling, Redis round-trip integration, and cosine math sanity checks.

nodes.name: test_year_confusion_does_not_collide
nodes.summary: Parametrized test of the module-4 §2.3 worked example: year-confusing near-misses (cosine ~0.947-0.961) must be below both the 0.97 floor and 0.98 default threshold to prevent wrong-year cache hits.

nodes.name: test_cache_key_is_role_bound
nodes.summary: Proves same embedding bucket + year with different roles produces different SHA-256 cache keys, preventing confused-deputy cache side channel.

nodes.name: test_temporal_correctness.py
nodes.summary: Validates temporal validity: retrieval returns the correct legislative version for a given tax year, valid_from/valid_to date range filter excludes wrong versions, superseded documents carry disclosure metadata, and cross-lingual (English) temporal queries retrieve correct Dutch law chunks.

nodes.name: TestTemporalRetrieval
nodes.summary: Tests that retrieval returns tax_year-correct chunks: 2021 query returns 37.10% rate, 2023 query returns 36.93% rate, and no year-confusion from dense near-misses.

nodes.name: TestValidFromValidToFilter
nodes.summary: Tests valid_from/valid_to date range boundary conditions: inclusive boundary, open-ended null valid_to, and exclusion of wrong-year versions — mirrors OpenSearch DSL range filter.

nodes.name: TestSupersededDocumentDisclosure
nodes.summary: Domain review Check 4: superseded chunks carry superseded_by metadata for generator disclosure. Tests historical queries may return superseded chunks with disclosure fields, and current-year queries exclude superseded versions.

nodes.name: TestCrossLingualTemporal
nodes.summary: Parametrized test: English-language temporal queries must retrieve Dutch legislation chunks for the specified tax year, validating Cohere cross-lingual embedding coverage.

nodes.name: is_valid_on
nodes.summary: Returns True if a chunk is in force on the given query_date, mirroring the OpenSearch filter DSL: valid_from <= query_date AND (valid_to >= query_date OR valid_to IS NULL).

nodes.name: RBAC Classification Hierarchy
nodes.summary: Four-tier role/classification system: helpdesk (public only), inspector/legal (public+internal), fiod (public+internal+fiod). Enforced at OpenSearch efficient_filter (Layer 1) and redaction_guard (Layer 2). RBAC Leak Rate = 0.00 hard gate.

nodes.label: Hybrid BM25 + Dense Retrieval

properties.description: OpenSearch native hybrid query combining BM25 (sparse, dutch analyzer, 100 candidates) and k-NN dense search (100 candidates) fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (k=60) in a single round trip. Regex router adjusts BM25/kNN weights: 0.7/0.3 for exact citation queries, 0.5/0.5 for semantic.

nodes.name: Hybrid BM25 + Dense Retrieval
nodes.summary: Hybrid BM25 + Dense Retrieval — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: Role-Bound Semantic Cache

properties.description: Redis Stack 7.4 semantic cache with SHA-256 key encoding emb_bucket â€– role â€– classification_ceiling â€– tax_year. Cosine floor 0.97 (floor) / 0.98 (operational default). Prevents year-confusion (Box 1 2024 vs 2023 simâ‰ˆ0.955 blocked). TTL = min(24h, nightly diff, legislative expiry). Role-blind cache is a confused-deputy side channel.

nodes.name: Role-Bound Semantic Cache
nodes.summary: Role-Bound Semantic Cache — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.name: Zero-Hallucination Citation Guard
nodes.summary: Three-step citation verifier: Step 1 extract anchors (ANCHOR_PATTERN + ECLI_PATTERN), Step 2 deterministic chunk match at full hierarchy depth (doc_id/article/lid/onderdeel/sub), Step 3 Haiku NLI entailment check. Citation Accuracy = 1.00 hard promotion gate.

nodes.label: Redis Stack 7.4 (Semantic Cache)

properties.description: Redis Stack 7.4 with RediSearch + VECTOR field type for semantic cache. Deployable as ElastiCache Serverless in us-east-1. Sub-millisecond KNN lookup (HNSW in-process). Atomic SET/GET with TTL in same keyspace as session tokens.

nodes.name: docker-runner.md

nodes.name: legal-domain-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Claude AI agent definition for the legal domain reviewer. Reviews module designs against Dutch Belastingdienst tax authority context (ECLI case law, FIOD classification, Box 1/2/3 tax structure), flagging domain-specific issues.

nodes.name: mlops-security-architect.md

nodes.name: process-report-author.md

nodes.name: rag-evaluation-engineer.md

nodes.name: rag-retrieval-architect.md
nodes.summary: Claude AI agent definition for the RAG retrieval architect. Designs the ingestion pipeline (Module 1) and retrieval layer (Module 2): chunking strategy, metadata schema, vector DB choice, HNSW/quantization, hybrid BM25+dense fusion, and reranking.

nodes.name: README.md

nodes.name: assignment
nodes.summary: Original assignment specification for the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system. Defines the scenario (500,000-document corpus for tax inspectors, legal counsel, helpdesk), system constraints (zero-hallucination, RBAC, TTFT < 1.5s), and four design modules.

nodes.name: CRAG Control Loop
nodes.summary: Corrective RAG (CRAG) state machine: transform_query → retrieve → grade_documents → generate → verify_citations. Retries on ambiguous evidence, issues structured refusals when grounding fails. Prevents hallucination.

nodes.name: RBAC Efficient-Filter
nodes.summary: Role-Based Access Control applied inside HNSW graph traversal via OpenSearch efficient_filter, preventing timing side-channel leaks and empty-set inference that would reveal classified (FIOD) documents.

nodes.name: Hybrid BM25 + Dense Search
nodes.summary: Retrieval strategy combining sparse BM25 keyword search with dense vector search (Cohere embed-multilingual-v3) to handle exact citation lookups (ECLI codes) and semantic concept queries in the legal domain.

nodes.name: Multi-Agent Workflow
nodes.summary: Six-phase multi-agent orchestration: parallel design agents (rag-retrieval-architect, agentic-rag-designer, mlops-security-architect) → legal-domain-reviewer → rag-evaluation-engineer → docker-runner → report-compiler → process-report-author.

nodes.label: RBAC efficient_filter (Pre-filter inside HNSW)

properties.description: OpenSearch Lucene engine pre-computes a BitSet of allowed document IDs before HNSW traversal begins. Classified (FIOD) nodes are invisible to the graph walk â€” eliminates both empty-set existence-disclosure and timing side-channel leaks. Only approach that prevents both leak vectors simultaneously.
properties.formalProof: traversal restricted to G' = {d âˆˆ G : d.classification âˆˆ allowed}

nodes.name: RBAC efficient_filter (Pre-filter inside HNSW)
nodes.summary: RBAC efficient_filter (Pre-filter inside HNSW) — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World)

properties.description: Approximate nearest-neighbor graph algorithm used in OpenSearch Lucene engine. Parameters: m=32 (bidirectional links per node), ef_construction=256 (build beam width), ef_search=128 (query beam width). Chosen for efficient_filter support within traversal.

nodes.name: HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World)
nodes.summary: HNSW (Hierarchical Navigable Small World) — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)

properties.description: Rank-based score fusion method (Cormack et al.). Does not require per-query score normalisation. k=60 constant. Degrades gracefully when one retriever returns few results (e.g., k-NN with ECLI exact queries). Post-RRF output: top-60 deduplicated candidates.

nodes.name: Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)
nodes.summary: Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: CRAG Self-Healing Loop (Corrective RAG)

properties.description: LangGraph state machine implementing Corrective RAG. Nodes: transform_query â†’ retrieve â†’ grade_documents â†’ decide â†’ generate / generate_with_disclosure / structured_refusal â†’ verify_citations. Loop guards: max 2 transform attempts, max 1 generation retry. Worst case: 6 Haiku calls.

nodes.name: CRAG Self-Healing Loop (Corrective RAG)
nodes.summary: CRAG Self-Healing Loop (Corrective RAG) — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: Citation Verification (Anchor + NLI Judge)

properties.description: Three-step verification: (1) regex anchor extraction capturing full (doc_id, article, lid, onderdeel, sub) + ECLI pattern; (2) deterministic chunk lookup matching all non-null fields; (3) NLI grounding judge (Haiku) checking entailment. Fail-closed: never returns final_answer when grounded=False. Citation Accuracy promotion gate = 1.00.

nodes.name: Citation Verification (Anchor + NLI Judge)
nodes.summary: Citation Verification (Anchor + NLI Judge) — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: Query Transformation (Direct / Decompose / HyDE / Step-back)

properties.description: Routing rule applies exactly one transform per query. Direct: exact identifiers (ECLI, art., lid). Decompose: â‰¥2 distinct legal concepts. HyDE: vague/concept-only query. Step-back: narrow factual on re-entry after Irrelevant verdict. Decompose subsumes others.

nodes.name: Query Transformation (Direct / Decompose / HyDE / Step-back)
nodes.summary: Query Transformation (Direct / Decompose / HyDE / Step-back) — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: Parent-Document Retrieval

properties.description: Leaf chunks (256 tokens) are embedded and retrieved; parent chunks (1500 tokens) are fetched via mget at generation time. LLM receives full article context while citations pin to exact leaf (lid/onderdeel/sub). Prevents embedding space pollution from large context chunks.

nodes.name: Parent-Document Retrieval
nodes.summary: Parent-Document Retrieval — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: Document-Level Security (DLS)

properties.description: OpenSearch Security plugin DLS applies terms filter at shard/index-reader level. Belt-and-suspenders: independent of query-time efficient_filter. Both must fail simultaneously for a data leak. Per-role DLS rules: helpdesk=[public], inspector/legal=[public,internal], fiod=[public,internal,fiod].

nodes.name: Document-Level Security (DLS)
nodes.summary: Document-Level Security (DLS) — concept in the Tax Authority Enterprise RAG system.

nodes.label: Redaction Guard (Secondary RBAC Gate)

properties.description: Context-level post-retrieval filter. Drops chunks where classification > user.classification_ceiling (ordinal: public=0, internal=1, fiod=2). Catches metadata misclassification bugs in ingestion pipeline. Also applied to structured_refusal.closest_hits to prevent FIOD existence-disclosure. Any drop triggers CloudWatch metric rbac_guard_drop_count.
properties.alertThreshold: 5 drops in 5 minutes â†’ PagerDuty P2

nodes.name: Redaction Guard (Secondary RBAC Gate)

tour.title: Project Overview & Assignment
tour.description: Start with the README and original assignment to understand the project's purpose: an evidence-backed enterprise RAG system for a national tax authority handling a 500,000-document corpus with zero-hallucination citation, RBAC enforcement, and sub-1.5s TTFT. The assignment defines the four design modules and system constraints that drive every downstream decision.

tour.title: Multi-Agent Planning
tour.description: Before any code was written, a multi-agent orchestration plan decomposed the work across seven specialist agents — retrieval architect, agentic RAG designer, MLOps security architect, evaluation engineer, docker runner, legal domain reviewer, report compiler, and process report author. The MASTER-PLAN locked the AWS stack, HNSW parameters, promotion gates, and six-phase execution sequence that all agents follow.

tour.title: Architecture Design Documents
tour.description: The four module design documents capture the full system architecture: Module 1/2 covers structure-aware chunking and hybrid BM25+dense retrieval with Cohere embeddings and RRF fusion; Module 3 defines the CRAG LangGraph state machine with query transformation and citation verification; Module 4 specifies three-layer RBAC, Redis semantic cache, OTel observability, and CI/CD promotion gates. The FINAL document is the compiled, submission-ready synthesis.

tour.title: Core Evaluation Harness — conftest.py
tour.description: The shared pytest infrastructure in conftest.py is the backbone of the entire test suite. It defines the RBAC role matrix, promotion-gate constants, core dataclasses (UserContext, ChunkMeta, RAGResponse), a deterministic MockRAGClient, the HaikuJudge LLM-as-judge backed by AWS Bedrock Claude Haiku 4.5, and a 20-document Dutch tax-law MOCK_CORPUS. Understanding this file is essential before reading any individual test module.

tour.title: Docker Infrastructure
tour.description: The evaluation stack is fully containerised: a multi-stage Python 3.12 Dockerfile builds a minimal non-root runtime image, docker-compose.yml wires together OpenSearch 2.18, Redis Stack 7.4, Jaeger all-in-one, and the app container with health-checked startup ordering. The compose.override.yml exposes host ports and bind-mounts tests/ for hot-reload iteration during development.

tour.title: RBAC Red-Team & Security Validation
tour.description: The RBAC red-team suite attacks the system with seven threat-model classes — direct FIOD title queries, semantic proximity attacks, cross-role cache poisoning, prompt injection escalation, structured-refusal existence disclosure, legal-counsel FIOD escalation, and redaction-guard audit counters. A RBAC Leak Rate of 0.00 is a hard CI promotion gate enforced by assert_thresholds.py.

tour.title: CRAG & Citation Accuracy Tests
tour.description: The citation accuracy tests enforce a hard Citation Accuracy = 1.00 gate: every claim in a generated answer must have a verifiable anchor (doc_id, article, lid, onderdeel, ECLI) that passes both a deterministic regex verifier and an NLI judge backed by Haiku 4.5. The ambiguity refusal tests ensure that out-of-corpus, under-specified, and contradictory queries produce structured refusals with no fabricated citations and loop-guard caps enforced.

tour.title: Hybrid Retrieval & Temporal Correctness
tour.description: The hybrid retrieval tests verify that ECLI/article exact-match queries rank correctly via BM25, semantic queries surface in top-5 dense results, RRF fusion deduplicates both arms, and the Cohere reranker improves nDCG@5. Temporal correctness tests validate that valid_from/valid_to date filters return the right legislative version for a given tax year, correctly excluding superseded Dutch law chunks.

tour.title: Observability & Latency Budgets
tour.description: The observability tests enforce OTel span contracts from Module 4 §5.2 — every query must emit spans with user_role propagation, RBAC verdict attributes, and Ragas-style metric gates (Faithfulness ≥ 0.95, ContextRecall ≥ 0.90). Latency budget tests enforce SLA thresholds: p95 TTFT ≤ 1500ms, p99 TTFT ≤ 2500ms, and retrieval p95 ≤ 300ms, with demo traces emitted to Jaeger for visual validation.

tour.title: Reports & Evaluation Results
tour.description: The reports directory captures the full execution outcome: 179 test cases in junit.xml (164 passed against real AWS Bedrock), a Jaeger observability report with waterfall breakdowns for cache-hit, refusal, and full-generation scenarios, per-agent timing telemetry in agent-timings.jsonl, and the PROCESS-REPORT.md documenting the multi-agent methodology. The run-eval.sh orchestrator script ties the entire 8-step pipeline together end-to-end.
